# Summary

Describe the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Contract update
- [ ] Packaging or release hygiene
- [ ] Other release-safe change

## Source Hygiene

- [ ] Uses only public, user-owned, or authorized material.
- [ ] Does not include private, leaked, NDA, proprietary, or incompatible-license implementation material.
- [ ] Does not include real API keys, private papers, restricted datasets, or secrets.

## Contracts And Public API

- [ ] No public API or MCP namespace change.
- [ ] Public API or MCP namespace change is synchronized with contracts, docs, and tests.

## Tests

```powershell
# paste commands run
```

## Documentation

List updated docs or explain why docs are not needed.

## Release Notes

Mention any impact on TulingResearch Plus release readiness.
